title: T-021 — GET /api/production/work-orders/:id full runtime state endpoint
prompt:
# T-021 — GET /work-orders/:id runtime state

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.1 FR-08-E1-006

## Goal
Implement GET /api/production/work-orders/[id] returning full runtime state: status, consumption progress %, output progress %, current operator, elapsed time, BOM snapshot.

## Implementation contract
App Router GET handler returning JSON {wo_id, status, started_at, current_operator_id, elapsed_min, planned_duration_min, consumption_progress_pct, output_progress_pct, components:[{component_id, planned_qty, consumed_qty, remaining_qty}], outputs:[{output_type, qty_kg, lp_id, batch_number}]}. Compute: consumption_progress = sum(consumed)/sum(planned) on BOM snapshot, output_progress = sum(qty_kg)/expected_output_qty. Cache 30s with cacheLife() per Next.js 16 Cache Components.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/get-wo-runtime-state.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given WO with 3 BOM components and 2 consumed at 50% each, when GET called, then response.consumption_progress_pct equals 33.3 (1.5 consumed / 3 planned ×100/3)
2. Given WO IN_PROGRESS for 45min planned 60min, when GET called, then response.elapsed_min=45, planned_duration_min=60
3. Given non-existent wo_id, when GET called, then 404 with error code 'wo_not_found'

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting consumption_progress + elapsed + 404 before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*runtime-state'

## Risk red lines
- Do not expose other tenants' WOs (RLS enforced)
- Do not return null for required fields (use 404 instead)
- Do not cache for >30s (operator-facing freshness §5.4#1)

pipeline_inputs.description: GET /work-orders/:id runtime state aggregating wo_executions + BOM + consumption + outputs.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single read query joining wo_executions, work_orders, wo_materials (BOM snapshot), wo_material_consumption sums, wo_outputs sums. Cache with cacheLife({stale:30}). Response shape per §7.1 FR-08-E1-006.
out_of_scope: Do not implement timeline tab (UI task)
Do not implement genealogy tab (UI task)
acceptance_criteria: Given 3 components 2 consumed at 50%, when GET, then consumption_progress_pct=33.3 (1.5/3×100)/3 averaged correctly
Given WO 45min in 60min plan, when GET, then elapsed_min=45 planned_duration_min=60
Given non-existent wo_id, when GET, then 404 wo_not_found
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting progress + elapsed + 404 before route exists
risk_red_lines: Do not return null required fields
